highlights.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Brooklyn Nets: Game Highlights) 2025/11/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Julius Randle had 19 points, 11 rebounds and 10 assists in his 15th career triple-double, and the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the winless Brooklyn Nets 125-109 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Julius Randle has a triple-double to lead the Timberwolves past the winless Nets

highlights.description: Milwaukee Bucks vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Milwaukee Bucks vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2025/11/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo made a 17-foot buzzer-beating jumper to give the Milwaukee Bucks a 117-115 victory over the short-handed Indiana Pacers on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antetokounmpo hits buzzer-beater to send Bucks past Pacers 117-115 in Turner's Indy return

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Utah Jazz vs. Boston Celtics: Game Highlights) 2025/11/04 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jusuf Nurkic dropped in a putback with 0.6 seconds remaining and the Utah Jazz overcame a double-digit, second-half deficit to beat the Boston Celtics 105-103 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jusuf Nurkic makes last-second putback to lift the Jazz past the Celtics, 105-103

headlines.shortLinkText: Towns scores season-high 33 points to lead the Knicks past the Wizards, 119-102

headlines.description: — Amen Thompson scored a season-high 27 points, Alperen Sengun added 26 points and 11 rebounds and the Houston Rockets outlasted the Dallas Mavericks for a 110-102 victory on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Amen Thompson scores a season-high 27 points to lead Rockets to fourth straight win

headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham scored 19 of his 33 points in the fourth quarter and the Detroit Pistons held off the Memphis Grizzlies 114-106 on Monday night.

events.name: Los Angeles Lakers at Portland Trail Blazers

headlines.description: — Deandre Ayton had 29 points, 10 rebounds and three blocked shots against his former team, leading the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers to a 123-115 victory over the Portland Trail Blazers on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lakers overcome the absence of Doncic and Reaves for a 123-115 win over the Blazers

headlines.description: — Bam Adebayo had 25 points and 10 rebounds, Norman Powell added 21 points in his return to Southern California and the Miami Heat held off the Los Angeles Clippers 120-119 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bam Adebayo scores 25 points, Heat hold off Clippers 120-119 following 3rd-quarter surge
